benefits.description: Skin has never felt softer, thicker, healthier, and better overall

protocol_notes: Detailed night and morning topical skincare routine. GHK-CU powder mixed with hyaluronic acid at ~3% applied to problem areas (stomach, thighs, underside of arms). Avoids using GHK-CU topical on nights when sugar scrub contains incompatible ingredients (acids, vitamin C). Uses chemical sunscreen (no zinc/mineral) when going out, as zinc ions can interfere with copper in GHK-CU. Also uses retinol serum and retinol night cream on face.
